FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Yen Unwinds Intervention Gains Amid Negative Macro Fundamentals
tldr_points: Japanese yen continues to erase intervention-driven gains as domestic macro backdrop remains negative
USD/JPY retains upside bias amid steady global risk sentiment and wide US-Japan yield differentials
Technical structure favors bullish momentum as transitory intervention support fades
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY bullish bias as yen erodes intervention gains; macro fundamentals favor upside amid steady risk.
FX.comment: Yen erases intervention gains amid negative macro backdrop, favoring USD/JPY upside

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 市場分析
tldr_points: AI earnings surge meets Fed pause; S&P 500 tests MA20 support
Bullish bias solidifies as macro risk fades
Technical structure shows MA20 support with rising momentum
STOCKS.excerpt: AI earnings surge meets Fed pause; S&P 500 tests MA20 support, bullish bias solidifies as macro risk fades today still.
STOCKS.comment: AI earnings surge meets Fed pause; S&P 500 tests MA20 support, bullish bias solidifies as macro risk fades today still.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] FLAT: Mixed Regulatory Signals Offset Ecosystem Catalysts
tldr_points: Mixed regulatory developments limit near-term directional conviction for BTC/USD
Operational restoration at Coinbase alleviates short-term liquidity constraints
Layer 2 and altcoin ecosystem funding provides no direct catalyst for BTC price action
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD trades rangebound as mixed regulatory headlines offset selective ecosystem funding tailwinds.
CRYPTO.comment: Mixed regulatory signals and unavailable technical data preclude directional conviction
